# Acme Realtime Telemetry Pipeline

## What This Is

A real, fully-answered `.planning/PROJECT.md` reference artifact used by the D-05
real-answer guard. It proves the core-loop produces a STRUCTURALLY-VALID artifact
that also carries a REAL validated answer: the project name sentinel
"Acme Realtime Telemetry Pipeline" appears verbatim.

## Core Value

A Bob user running new-project lands a PROJECT.md whose fields hold their real
answers — the sentinel project name appears verbatim and no unfilled markers
survive.

## Requirements

### Active

- [ ] Ingest the Acme device fleet telemetry stream over the realtime gateway
- [ ] Aggregate per-device rollups into the analytics warehouse
